name: Aloo Ko Achar (Potato Salad)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Potatoes, small size if possible
1/4 cup Sesame seeds, roasted and ground, optional
3 tablespoons Corn oil or Mustard oil (mustard gives best flavor)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil potatoes until tender.
2. Peel and cut into small pieces.
3. In a bowl, mix potatoes, turmeric, salt, ground sesame seeds, lime juice, half of the chopped coriander, and water thoroughly.
4. Heat mustard oil in a small pan until hot. Add cumin seeds and dried chilies. Fry until brown.
5. Add jalapeno peppers to the pan and cook for a minute or so.
6. Pour the mixture over the potatoes and mix well.
7. Garnish with remaining chopped coriander leaves.
8. Serve 6-8 people.
